svg.title: Build rhythm: Codex daily tokens and GitHub weekly activity
svg.desc: Build rhythm: daily Codex token usage from 2026-06-13 through 2026-07-12, followed by weekly GitHub activity across the default branches of owned repositories from 2021-07-11 through 2026-07-05. These panels use different time windows and do not imply causation. The GitHub panels show commits, additions, and deletions; their scales compress large spikes so quieter weeks remain visible. Codex account lifetime: 20,860,271,364 tokens. Last 30 days: 16,975,567,881 tokens, equivalent to about $14,252 at public API prices, not a Codex bill. Peak day Jul 1, 2026: 1,748,633,377 tokens. The final day is partial. Totals: 2,938 commits, 29,104,554 additions, 28,513,917 deletions, and 159 active weeks. Highest commit week Jun 28, 2026: 795 commits. Largest line-change week Jul 5, 2026: 24,222,547 additions and 21,992,716 deletions.
svg.text: LAST 30 DAYS · 17.0B TOKENS · ~$14.3K AT PUBLIC API PRICES
159 active GitHub weeks · Typical week 2k lines changed · Updated Jul 13, 2026
Public-API comparison, not a Codex bill.
